annotation_target.structure: Main theme return antecedent — cantabile resumes, Ab major
teaching_goals: feel the return as a relief after the episode's agitation
the cantabile quality should feel like coming home
style_tips: pp — the contrast with the episode makes the return even more peaceful

teaching_notes.note: The theme returns — relief after the episode. Let the peace return fully.

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 33–36 of Pathetique Sonata, 2nd Movement (Adagio cantabile), view the piano roll, analyze the phrase, play in a loop, and predict the continuation.

session.content: Show me measures 33–36 of Pathetique mvt 2 — does the cantabile theme return here?
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 33–36.
Measures 33–36 bring the return of the cantabile Ab major theme — the rocking LH arpeggios and singing melody resume after the contrasting episode. Let me loop mm. 33–36.
Pathetique mvt 2 mm. 33–36: cantabile theme return, Ab major, rocking LH resumes.
